title: Tooltip Tool Tips
description: Provides more information about tools (and armor) in their tooltips
body:
Hold Shift over a tool (or armor piece) to get more information about it, such as Harvest Level, Harvest Speed, Enchantability and Max Durability.

Harvest Speed also takes the Efficiency enchantment into consideration!

This mod is purely client side only. That means you can use it on vanilla servers!
